entry.title: 7.10th,7.12th
entry.content:
1. critic批评者反对者评论家评论员

    criticism评论，批评

  2. a hotel chain1家连锁酒店

    a fast food chain

    a chain store

  3. a wave of visotors一大批游客

    an army of

    a sea of

  4. on campus/off campus

  5. in a typical classroom setting 在传统的教室环境

  6. criticize favourably评价很高

    criticize constantly
    经常批评

    criticize constructively
    建设性地评论

    criticize energetically
    积极地评论

    criticize expertly
    专业地评论

  7. in criticism of sb’s views评论某人的看法

  8. urbanization wave 城市化浪潮

  9. outspoken adj 直率; 坦诚; v公开宣布

  10. stern

    严厉的；苛刻的；要求别人服从的 serious and often disapproving; expecting sb to obey you

    严峻的；难对付的serious and difficult

  11. 善用draw

    draw criticism

  12. Question质疑

  13. drill

    钻；钻头；钻床；钻机 a tool or machine with a pointed end for making holes

    练习；训练 a way of learning sth by means of repeated exercises

    （应对紧急情况的）演习 a practice of what to do in an emergency, for example if there is a fire

    a fire drill消防演习

  14. reject an appeal 驳回上诉

  15. The diversity of language。-》How diverse language could be。

  16. the aged 老人

  17. empty nester空巢老人

  18. left-behind children 留守儿童

    The problem of left-behind children is essentially the absence of family education.

    留守儿童问题本质上是家庭教育的缺失。

  19. juvenile 未成年的，不成熟的

  20. 子女 children - 》descendants

  21. Intellectuals chiefly acquire the experience of our predecessors through reading books

    -》It is chiefly through reading books that intellectuals acquire the experience of our predecessors.
entry.summary:
1. critic批评者反对者评论家评论员

    criticism评论，批评

  2. a hotel chain1家连锁酒店

    a fast food chain

    a chain store

entry.title: July 9th English Notes
entry.content:
1. mileage 里程，益处

  2. beat her up 殴打

  3. tick off 列举，打钩

  4. the terrific scene transcend my power of description风景之美非言语足以描述

  5. His determination allowed him to progress in leaps and bounds， and give him the opportunity to become a learned person。这种苦学的精神促使他的学识突飞猛进，成为饱学之士。

  6. ceaselessly不断地

  7. no thorns,no throne 不踏过荆棘，就登不上王位。

  8. about adv,到处

  9. poem poetry verse区别：第一个是指一首诗或者是诗体文，第二个是指诗的总称，第三个多指诗句诗节，也可以做诗歌韵文的总称。

  10. Marriages in proximity of blood are forbidden.禁止近亲结婚

  11. municipal library 市图书馆

  12. suspend

    1）暂停；中止 suspend hostilities停战

    2）延缓推迟 suspend ~

    2，inevitable 和 irresistible

    ​ Inevitable 不可避免的 the inevitability of death

    ​ Irresistible 无法抵制的 I felt an irresistible urge to laugh.

  13. 【写作】coordinate our effort 齐心协力

  14. Concerns 与…有关; 涉及

  15. Brisk 快的; 敏捷的 a brisk walk

  16. Scale effect规模效应,规模越大，效率越高

  17. A formal of accounts

  18. Account for说明（原因bai、理由等）du；导致，引起；（在数量、比例上）占zhi；对…负责

  19. Post 构成 the shortage of water post the most immediate threat

  20. Make a feint to the east, but attack in the west.声东击西，feint，假动作，虚晃（n,v）

  21. Tourist town 旅游小镇

  22. A host of 大量的 ~friends

  23. Any new commission would have to address a host of theoretical, empirical and practical issues.

    任何新的委员会都必须应对各种理论、经验和实际课题。

  24. address 设法解决；处理；对付；演讲

    ~ (yourself to) sth

    to think about a problem or a situation and decide how you are going to deal with it

    We must address ourselves to the problem of traffic pollution. 我们必须设法解决交通污染问题。

  25. It is my profound belief that not only do we all need nature, but we all seek nature, whether we know we are doing so or not.我深信我们不仅都需要自然，而且也都在寻觅着自然，不管我们知不知道我们正在这样做。

  26. townfolk 村民

  27. I have realized how little basis there is for the divisions that

    Exist among us.我意识到我们中存在的分歧是多么没有依据。

  28. existence 生活 earn one’s existence

    Live a day-to-day existence(过一天算一天的生活)

    Hand-to-mouth existence仅能糊口的

  29. Work a mine开采

  30. 2 miles off the coast(far away)

    After months of drilling,oil was found off the coast.(on)

  31. Division of a by b a/b

  32. In charge of 负责

  33. Achieve happiness 获得幸福

  34. It says 报告说

  35. Worsening inequalities 不平等加剧

  36. Yield 生产，产量

  37. 谴责Condemn sb to

    The government issued a statement condemning the killings.

    政府发表声明谴责这些凶杀事件。

    宣判 to say what sb’s punishment will be

    He was condemned to death for murder and later hanged.他因凶杀罪被判处死刑后被绞死。

    迫使…接受困境to force sb to accept an unpleasant situation

    They were condemned to a life of hardship.

    宣告使用…不安全

    表明有罪 to show or suggest that sb is guilty of sth

    She is condemned out of her own mouth (= her own words show that she is guilty) .

    她自己说的话显示她有罪责。

  38. non-stop adj adv

    直达的 without any stops a non-stop flight to Tokyo

    到东京的直达航班

    不间断的；不停的without any pauses or stops

    non-stop entertainment/work

  39. 奖学金 merit aid

  40. typically

    1,通常；一般used to say that sth usually happens in the way that you are stating

    The factory typically produces 500 chairs a week.这家工厂通常每周生产500把椅子。

    2，典型地in a way that shows the usual qualities or features of a particular type of person, thing or group

    typically American hospitality美国人特有的殷勤好客

    3,不出所料；果然in the way that you expect sb/sth to behave

    He was typically modest about his achievements.

    他一如既往，对自己的成就很谦虚。

  41. in a bid to 为了

    I come here in a bid to assess the situation. 对情况进行评定

    我到这里来是为了调查情况。

  42. 国有企业和事业单位state-owned enterprises and public institutions

    公立学校public institutions公营机构

  43. Unidentifiable无法辨认的; 难以确认的

  44. Object 宗旨；目的；目标 an aim or a purpose

    If you’re late, you’ll defeat the whole object of the exercise .如果你迟到了，便不能达到整个活动的目的。

  45. Objective 目标;目的 something that you are trying to achieve

    to meet/achieve your objectives

    object&objective

    object 强调个人或需求而决定的目标、目的。

    objective与object基本同义，但语义更广泛，指具体或很快能达到的目的，也可指军事目标。书面用词。

  46. objection反对

  47. Defeat 使失败；阻挠 to stop sth from being successful

  48. combat

    战斗

    防止；减轻to stop sth unpleasant or harmful from happening or from getting worse

    e.g measures to combat crime/inflation/unemployment/disease 防止犯罪 / 通货膨胀 / 失业 / 疾病的措施

  49. alleviation

    减轻；缓解If you alleviate pain, suffering, or an unpleasant condition, you make it less intense or severe.

    a great deal can be done to alleviate back pain.如今，减轻背部疼痛可以有许多方法。

    speeding up poverty alleviation 加快脱贫

    poverty alleviation 扶贫

  50. grinding

    无休止的If you describe a bad situation as grinding, you mean it never gets better, changes, or ends.

    Their grandfather had left his village in order to escape the grinding poverty.（贫苦不堪）为了摆脱贫困的煎熬，他们的祖父离开了村子。

  51. Civil engineering土木工程

  52. helpful 乐于助人的

  53. particles 粒子(s)

  54. strip cartoon 连环画

  55. strip 脱光衣服

    He was stripped naked and left in a cell.他被扒得一丝不挂，丢在一间牢房里。

    n 条，带

    Cut the meat into strips.把肉切成条

  56. optimistic->optimism

    skeptical->skepticism
entry.summary:
1. mileage 里程，益处

  2. beat her up 殴打

  3. tick off 列举，打钩

  4. the terrific scene transcend my p

entry.title: hasNext(),next(),nextLine(),hasNextLine()
entry.content:
• hasNext（） 是检测 还有没有下一个输入

  • next（）是指针移动到当前下标，并取出下一个输入

    Scanner sc = new Scanner(System.in);while(sc.hasNext()){    System.out.println("键盘输入的内容是：" + sc.next());}//依次取出输入内容（空格做分割）

  • nextLine（） 把指针移动到下一行 让然后取出当前这一行的输入(输出带空格)

  • hasNextLine（） 是检测下一行有没有输入

在使用的时候有需要注意的地方：

  • 　next()不会吸取字符前/后的空格/Tab键，只吸取字符，开始吸取字符（字符前后不算）直到遇到空格/Tab键/回车截止吸取；

  • 　nextLine()吸取字符前后的空格/Tab键，回车键截止。

  • 出现第一种结果的原因是Leo的后面有空格输入程序自动终止，scanner.next()方法将指针从当前位置指向下一个被断字符断开的有效元素的末尾，或下一个分隔符号区的起点位置，这样再nextLine的时候就输出空格+Schopen
  • 出现第一种结果的原因是Leo的后面有enter输入程序自动终止,next()与nextLine()一前一后执行赋值时，若next()刚好取走一行内容中最后一个有效元素、nextLine将由于当前指针后只剩一个换行符而无法正常赋值。此时nextLine执行后将返回””。因此有必要在next()后紧跟一个nextLine()，确保其后真正的赋值语句不取空值””。
entry.summary: • hasNext（） 是检测 还有没有下一个输入

entry.title: for(;;)和while(true)的区别
entry.content:
for(;;) 比 while(true) 好

“死循环”有两种写法：for(;;)和while(true)，两者其实是存在一些区别的，可以从底层的编译上看，使用前者会占用更少的寄存器。
entry.summary: for(;;) 比 while(

entry.title: May 24th English Notes
entry.content:
1. The ancestral temple。宗庙。
  2. Trying to criticize writing on the fly is Possibly the single greatest barrier to writing the most of us encounter。一边写一边批评性
  3. On the fly，匆忙地在百忙中。We have to eat our lunch on the fly。
  4. run Water into the glass。灌上水。
  5. Tempest。暴风雨。
  6. Interminable无休止的。
  7. There is a growing body of evidence suggesting that today’s young adults are also drawning in Credit card debate。越来越多的证据表明，如今的年轻人陷入了信用卡债务的泥潭。
  8. incorporate包含纳入
  9. harvest收成获得
  10. straw稻草
  11. mat垫子woven straw mats编织的草垫
  12. ears of corns玉米穗
  13. communal公共的
  14. alternate交替的轮流的
  15. The ceremony was followed by a meal
  16. saturated饱和的saturate使湿透;浸透;使充满;使饱和
  17. swallow燕子，吞
  18. alleviate减缓
  19. badge徽章
  20. hatch孵出
  21. Sea-link ferry。海上轮渡。
  22. Cried into my pillow。头埋进枕头里痛哭一场。
  23. crown you athlete of the year。认定你为本年度最佳运动员。
  24. cane甘蔗
  25. Sustain injuries。受伤。
  26. academic calendar校历
  27. existing perceptions 固有看法
  28. pastry馅饼
  29. 原始的initial，primitive
entry.summary:
1. The ancestral temple。宗庙。
  2. Trying to criticize writing on the fly is Possibly the single greatest barrier to writing the mos

entry.title: May 20th English Notes
entry.content:
1，navy blue深蓝

2，within the realm of possibility在可能的范围内

3，a stroke of genius神来之笔

4，demonstrate 表达，显露

5，dead-bolt lock防盗锁

6，electronic alarm system电子报警系统

7，crowning 至高无上的

8，hide my virtuals within myself把自己的美德藏起来

9，ground基本的

10，rustle 沙沙声 v(使) 发出轻轻的摩擦声，发出沙沙声

11，thanks to 多亏，由于

12，preferable更可取的更好，Death was considered vastly preferable to dishonor。可杀不可辱。

13，Capture the market。占领市场。

14，Aim an arrow at the target。将箭瞄准靶子

15，Gross national product 国民生产总值

Gross domestic product。国内生产总值

16，Deprive sb of liberty剥夺某人的自由。

17，Take the liberty of doing sth。擅自做某事。

18，Productive forces。生产力。

19，erode侵犯。

20，archer射箭运动员。

21，On one’s behalf。站在某人的立场上。

22，Restore relationship closings。恢复关系的亲密度。

23，unwrapped。解开打开。

24，Acknowledge致谢。感谢

25,Divert a driver’s attention to an alarming extent。分散司机的注意力到惊人的程度。

26,Pesticide residue。农药残留。

27，bear the signature of。有什么什么的签名。
entry.summary:
1，navy blue深蓝

2，within the realm of possibility在可能的范围内

3，a stroke of genius神来之笔

4，demonstrate 表达，显露

5，dead-bo

entry.title: May 15th English Notes
entry.content:
1，Employ the tricks。采用技巧。

2，vault 名词，金库，保险柜，地下墓穴。动词跳跃，撑杆跳（pole vault）。

3，Nursery provision。Service。保育服务。

4，Give up the ghost。断气儿。

5，Trick the parents欺骗父母。

6，Provision条款。规定。

7，Every trick in the book。千方百计。

8，Skin tones and hair textures。肤色和发型。

9，There are barbies with one of seven skin tones。有七种肤色的芭比娃娃

10，crack the code 破译密码 crack case 破案 crack problems破解难题

11，open the door a crack把门开一条缝

12，grip one’s attention 吸引抓住某人的注意力

13，strain every nerve竭尽全力

14，grip with认真考虑并处理

15，feed 饲料

16，Disposition性格，性情倾向。意向。排列布置。

have a cheerful disposition性情开朗

to have/show a disposition towards violence 有 / 表现出暴力倾向

understand the buildings from the disposition of walls and entrances. 从墙体门窗布局来识别建筑物

17,Breast feeding。母乳喂养。

18，Have iron nerves。坚强有胆量果敢。

19，Chuckle。低声轻笑;轻声地笑，暗笑。

20，candid坦率的，真诚的，偷拍的。

21，coarse grain 粗粮

22，resent 感到气愤

He bitterly resents being treated like a child.他十分厌恶被别人当孩子对待。

resentment不满

23，Appear optimistic，看似乐观。

24，trunk大箱子。树干。white Poplar。白杨树。

25，catapult 弹弓;(旧时的)石弩，弩炮;弹射器(用以从舰船上弹射飞机升空)v.(被)猛掷，猛扔

26，i have this image of you，as always，been cheerful and optimistic。我对你的印象一直都是很快乐和乐观。

26，cramm 塞，灌，装

27，we value Originality and independence more than the Chinese我们比中国人更重视创新和自立

28，The ones who will do the best in the new environment will be those Whose educations have prepared them To be flexible。

29，Casual acquaint。最熟识的人。

30，culprit 罪犯，罪魁祸首

31，Pointed fingers at。指责

32，round up围捕

33，A flood of prospectors大量的勘探者。

prospect前景，v勘探

34，The crystal sound of running water。清脆的流水声。清楚的，清晰的，清脆的，清澈的。

The calls of wild birds。野禽的鸣叫声。

35，in Spite of oneself。不由自主。

36，Residence permit。居住证。

37，A flood of words。滔滔不绝。

38，Communicate。传达。

39，Rigorous。adj.谨慎的; 细致的; 彻底的; 严格的; 严厉的;

40，cramp抽筋，痉挛，v阻碍

cramped狭小的

41，bijou 小巧玲珑的
entry.summary:
1，Employ the tricks。采用技巧。

2，vault 名词，金库，保险柜，地下墓穴。动词跳跃，撑杆跳（pole vault）。

3，Nursery provision。Service。保育服务。

4，Give up t

entry.title: May 13th English Notes
entry.content:
1，Sustainable agriculture。可持续发展农业。

2.Express enthusiasm for。热爱。

3，Enthusiasm and optimism。热情和积极性。

4，Of people。Employed。Agriculture Has decreased。

5，the number of people Employeed in agriculture has fallen。农业的从业人员人数下降。

6，Credit my account。

7，Set one aside for you。

8，How long will the alterations take。

9，inquire

If you inquire about something, you ask for information about it.

If you inquire into something, you investigate it carefully.

​ enquire(also inquire especially in NAmE)

​ inquiry 调查打听,n

Inquiry is the process of asking about or investigating something in order to find out more about it.

10， eliminate illiteracy消除文盲

11，abstract ideas 抽象概念

12，riddle 谜语

13，principal原理

14，inquiry 调查

15，A lively and inquiring mind，effective communication skills and the ability to work individually or as a part of the team。活泼好学的性格，有效的交流技巧，既有能力独立工作又可以成为团队的一员

16，A minute proportion。一个微小的部分。

17，The frontiers of scholarship。学术前沿。

18，On one’s formula 按原则。

19，Life jackets，救生衣。

20，Clip a light onto the jacket。别在

21，The a generals table for guests。丰富的菜式来招待客人吃饭。

22，rear 后部，臀部，n，adj，v，抚养，培育，饲养。

23，census人口普查

24，The civil affairs Bureau。民政局。

25，The waves break against the shore。波浪拍岸
entry.summary:
1，Sustainable agriculture。可持续发展农业。

2.Express enthusiasm for。热爱。

3，Enthusiasm and optimism。热情和积极性。

4，Of people。Employ

entry.title: May 12th English Notes
entry.content:
1，warrant授权令使有必要；使正当；使恰当 ,确保担保

stand behind and guarantee the quality, accuracy, or condition of

All entrants must warrant that their entry is entirely their own work

所有参赛者必须保证其参赛作品完全是自己创作的。

2，nanny (儿童家中的)保姆;奶奶;姥姥

3，mask 掩盖

4，scheme 计划，密谋

5，lifelike adj，逼真

6，Be mutually exclusive。互相排斥。

7，Marine life。海洋生物。

8，Angel立场。

9，Bar code。条形码。

10，plot。一小片地。

11，Career planning。职业规划。

12，A column chart。柱状图。Bar chart。条形图

13，Acute angle。锐角。Right angle。直角。

14，Strengthen the unity of nationalities。加强民族团结。

15，Marine chart航海图。

16，unseemly conduct不得体的行为。

17，flip chart。Chart taped to the wall

flip 快速翻转v,n抛

She felt her heart flip (= with excitement, etc.) .

她感到心潮澎湃。

按（开关）；按（按钮）

To flip a switch。

浏览；草草翻阅

I had a quick flip through the report while I was waiting.

我等待时迅速浏览了一下报告。

18，Breach。违反。

19，The code of conduct行为准则。
entry.summary:
1，warrant授权令使有必要；使正当；使恰当 ,确保担保

stand behind and guarantee the quality, accuracy, or condition of

All entrants

entry.title: May 10th English Notes
entry.content:
1，pursue demanding schedule 执行繁忙的日程

2，NATO 北约

3，contest the seat 角逐席位

4，scheme 计划；体系; 体制; 阴谋; v，密谋

​ schema (计划或理论的) 提要，纲要

5，The inevitable course of history 历史必由之路。

6，Select discreetly 谨慎地挑选。

7，Cable。有线电视。

8，Reduce my needs to the minimum。把我的需求降到最低限度。

9， bushy dark hair浓密的黑发。

10，Spread the payment over three months。分三个月付清。

11，Good teaching and research are not exclusive，but they are also not automatic Companions。

12，I’m not going to believe it myself。nevermind convince anyone else。自己都不会相信，更别提说服别人了。

13，People who score on personality tests as more sympathetic。性格测试结果为更富有同情心的人。

14， In this age of Internet chat，video games and reality television，there is no shortage of attracting activities to keep a child occupied。在这个充满上网聊天视频游戏和电视真人秀节目的时代，从来不缺吸引人的活动来占据孩子们的注意力。

15，An Institute of nuclear study核能研究所。

16，The naked eye肉眼。

17，Delicate craftsmanship精细的匠人手艺。

18，Feel out of place。感到不自在。

19，Wear and tear。磨损。

20，laboratory 实验室
entry.summary:
1，pursue demanding schedule 执行繁忙的日程

2，NATO 北约

3，contest the seat 角逐席位

4，scheme 计划；体系; 体制; 阴谋; v，密谋

​ sch

entry.title: May 5th English Notes
entry.content:
1，a grassy lawn 绿草如茵的草坪

2，China Time-honored Brand 中华老字号

3,a strong constitution

4，Europe is setting an example when it comes to food waste

5，Laws have been put into place

6，cut food waste

7，Facility，facilitate

facility 设施

facilitate 促进;促使;使便利 to make an action or a process possible or easier to happen

Structured teaching facilitates learning

8，impose

强加于，迫使，强迫接受，推行

It proves fearful for kids to manage to impose your own will to your them

9，dump丢掉，倾倒

He’s got no right to keep dumping his problems on me.他没有权利总是把他的问题推到我身上。

10,penalize 处罚

You will be penalized for poor spelling.你拼写不好将会受到处罚。

11,forbid //ban//prohibit

12，expiration date 有效期

13，appreciate认识到

14，the room is bare of furniture家徒四壁 live off porridge喝粥度日

15，roller skates 溜冰鞋

16，a roll of films 一卷胶卷

17，the craft of wood carving 木雕手艺

18，crack the nuts 剥壳

19，more and more research suggest that —> an accumulating body of research indicate that

20,a string of 一连串，一串

21，traditional craft industries 传统手工业
entry.summary:
1，a grassy lawn 绿草如茵的草坪

2，China Time-honored Brand 中华老字号

3,a strong constitution

4，Europe is setting an example when

entry.title: May 3rd English Notes
entry.content:
1,complicated ->sophisticated

As Artificial Intelligence becomes increasingly there are growing concerns that robots could become a
threat.随着人工智能变得越来越复杂，人们越来越担心机器人会成为人类的威胁。

2,Tears became more than a biological necessity to lubricate the eye and developed into a sign of intense emotion and a signal of social bonding. 眼泪不仅仅是润滑眼睛的生物必需品，更是发展成了一种强烈的情感符号和社会纽带的信号。

3,pensioner 退休人员

4，text发短信

5,settlement协议书，divorce ~离婚协议

6，divorced 有分歧的

7，不赞成（观点）do not subscribe to

8，permit admit

9，capital formation 集资

10，undergraduate大学生

11,an artistic temperament 艺术气质

12，劝告律师 nv

13，ignite点燃

14，a chain reaction of一连串

15，grade an essay评分

Advanced Expression

1,good way/method –> the elixir of 灵丹妙药

persistence in reading and writing keeps the elixir of language learning

2，release the traffic jams –> alleviate

gain comfort from friends may alleviate our wounded heart

3, avoid an escalating trade war that makes economic engagement between China and the West impossible

避免不断升级的贸易战导致西方和中国之间的经济往来无法继续

4,try to do –>give sth a shot

5,don’t need –> dispense with sth //abandon

–>do away with //abolish,destroy

6,have much further to go 还有很长的路要走；距离目标还很远

Robot technology has much further to go if the machines are to replace human carers.要取代人类护工，机器人技术还有很长的路要走。

7,plenty of scope for sth 某事有发挥/增长空间

In the medium-term, economists say there is plenty of scope for China to maintain relatively high growth rates. 经济学家称，中期而言，中国保持相对高增长的空间很大。/room/place

8,sth is natural part of sth. …是…自然的一部分

Stress is a natural part of everyday life.压力是日常生活的一部分。

such churn is a natural part of rising prosperity这种剧烈变动是的走向富足一个必经之路

9,take a heavy toll on sth对…造成不好影响

Frequent move took a toll on children’s performance.经常搬家影响了孩子的成绩。
entry.summary:
1,complicated ->sophisticated

As Artificial Intelligence becomes increasingly there are growing concerns that robo

entry.title: April 29th English Notes
entry.content:
1,despair 绝望

desperate 急需要，渴望，铤而走险，极困难

2，And so for the moment on this island we are witnesses to the beginning, as it were, of the pollution of our environment.因此，目前在这个岛上，不妨说我们是环境开始受到污染的见证人。

3，Administrative staff may be deskilled through increased automation and efficiency. （减低(某工作)的技术要求）随着自动化程度和效率的不断提高，对管理人员的技能要求可能会大大降低。

4，examine a witness 询问证人（目击者，证据，证人）

5，a desperate shortage奇缺，急切的

6，the irony of fate

7,the witness box 证人席

8，mounting despair

adj.
上升的;增长的

There is mounting evidence of serious effects on people’s health.

有越来越多的证据表明对人的健康有严重影响。

mounting excitement/concern/tension

越来越兴奋 / 关注 / 紧张

If you hide away your problems and pretend that they don’t exist they will just continue to mount up…

如果你把问题藏起来，假装它们不存在，问题只会越积越多。

9,frantic crowds 疯狂的人群 紧张忙乱的；手忙脚乱的

10，photo-centric websites 以图片为主的网站

11，motor 马达，汽车，汽车的，有引擎的

12，operate at near capacity 接近全力运转

13，hammock 吊床

14，as though=as if

15,set out 安排，陈述，说明，陈列，摆放

Set out the cakes attractively, using lacy doilies.网眼的蕾丝的，甜品网眼垫

铺上网眼垫纸，将蛋糕摆得诱人些。

He has written a letter to The Times setting out his views…

他已经给《泰晤士报》去信阐明自己的观点。

16,the figures for the growth of … represent the proportional growth of …

17,underemployment就业不足

18，indicate 表明

19，comet慧星 tail and generally fuzzy 狭长，通常模糊

20，veteran经验丰富的人;老手;退伍军人
entry.summary:
1,despair 绝望

desperate 急需要，渴望，铤而走险，极困难

2，And so for the moment on this island we are witnesses to the beginning, as it were

entry.title: April 28th English Notes
entry.content:
1,gross

  • 总的；毛的 being the total amount of sth before anything is taken away

gross weight (= including the container or wrapping) 毛重

  • 严重的 very obvious and unacceptable

gross indecency/negligence/misconduct 严重猥亵 / 过失 / 渎职

  • 令人不快的；令人恶心的；使人厌恶的very unpleasant 粗鲁的肥胖丑陋的·

同义词： disgusting

‘He ate it with mustard.’ ‘Oh, gross!’“他用芥末拌着吃。”“啊，真恶心！”

2，gross profift / the net profit 毛利/净利润

3，hide and seek

4，courteous有礼貌的；客气的；（尤指）恭敬的，谦恭的

5,resource allocation

6,seek a second opinion 寻求他人的意见

7，be considerate of others为他人着想

8，paint in water-colors

9.

  • 充满活力的；果断的；精力充沛的very active, determined or full of energy

同义词： energetic

a vigorous campaign against tax fraud

坚决打击骗税的运动

Take vigorous exercise for several hours a week.

每周做几个小时剧烈运动。

  • 身强体壮的

10，not only->not just

11,fix for them to … 安排他们去

12，worn用坏的;用旧的;磨薄的

13，link（链状物的）环，节，圈each ring of a chain

14，toad 蟾蜍

15，non-fiction纪实文学

16，routine 日常的，常规的，例行的

17，a tourist resort 观光胜地 a summer resort 避暑胜地

18,leave a tip付小费 receive a tip收小费

19，put up with忍受

keep up with跟上，不落人之后; 对…消息灵通; 保持接触;

20，fiscal财政的

21，peak hours高峰时间

22，speed things along 加快进度

23，deliver

  • 发表；宣布；发布
    to give a speech, talk, etc. or other official statement

  • 履行诺言；不负所望；兑现

​ She always delivers on her promises.她总是信守诺言。

  • 助产；接生
    to help a woman to give birth to a baby

    The baby was delivered by Caesarean section.这个婴儿是剖腹产下的。

24，milligram 毫克

25，broader picture 大局，整体情况

26,That might be in your favor. 那个你可能会喜欢。
If the truth is in your favor no one will believe you. 如果真相对你有利，没人会信你。

27,a flood of

28,concede承认

29,run conter to …与~背道而驰,与。。冲突

30，freight货物

31，interstate 州际的n.(美国)州际公路

32，last leg of the journey 最后一段行程

33，spontaneous即兴的，自发的
entry.summary:
1,gross

  • 总的；毛的 being the total amount of sth before anything is taken away

gross weight (= includ

entry.title: April 26th English Notes
entry.content:
1，hold the principle of mutual benefit.坚持互利原则

2，I was overwhelmed with longing for those innocent days of early childhood.我内心充满着对纯真童年早期时光的怀念。

3,strive for 争取…

4，to pick up where we left off last time 接着上次的地方接着继续讲

5，perform surgery 进行手术

6，discipline 学科科目

7，clear up the confusion

8,No comment

9,cling to ideal

10,Rather, we would not have been likely to spend enough time getting to know each other due to the lack of immediately visible mutual interests.相反，由于缺乏立即可见的共同利益，我们不可能花足够的时间彼此了解。

11,a illness confined him to bed for several months 一种病让他卧床数月

12，it was been favorably commented by the audience

13,discipline myself to exercise 坚持锻炼

14，revolution revolutionary revolve evolve evolution evolutionary involve

  • revolution [C, U] 革命

    an attempt, by a large number of people, to change the government of a country, especially by violent action

a socialist revolution 社会主义革命

  • 变革

A revolution in information technology is taking place.信息技术正在发生巨变。

  • （天体）旋转

*revolutionary[usually before noun] *

  • 革命的

connected with political revolution

a revolutionary leader革命领袖

  • 巨变的；突破性的

a revolutionary idea 独出心裁的想法

  • （支持）改革者；（尤指）革命者
  • revolve [V] 旋转；环绕；转动 to go in a circle around a central point

The fan revolved slowly.电扇缓慢地转动着。

evolove

~ (sth) (from sth) (into sth)

  • （使）逐渐形成，逐步发展，逐渐演变

    to develop gradually, especially from a simple to a more complicated form; to develop sth in this way

    Each school must evolve its own way of working.

    每个学校必须形成自己的办学方式。

  • 进化

evolution 进化;演变;发展;渐进

In politics Britain has preferred evolution to revolution (= gradual development to sudden violent change) .

英国在政治上喜欢渐进而不喜欢革命。

evolutionary 进化的；演变的；逐渐发展的
connected with evolution ; connected with gradual development and change

evolutionary theory进化论

involve 涉及 包含；需要；使成为必然部分（或结果）；牵连；影响
if a situation, an event or an activity involves sth, that thing is an important or necessary part or result of it

同义词： entail

[VN] Any investment involves an element of risk.

任何投资都有一定的风险。

15,relate relative relation relevant (注意拼写)

relate

  • 联系

  • 叙述；讲述；讲（故事）to give a spoken or written report of sth; to tell a story

    [VN] She relates her childhood experiences in the first chapters.

    在开始的几章中，她描述了自己童年的经历。

relative

  • 相比较而言的；比较的considered and judged by being compared with sth else

    the relative merits of the two plans

    相比较之下两个计划各自的优点

  • 相对的；相关联的considered according to its position or connection with sth else

    the position of the sun relative to the earth

    太阳与地球的相对位置

  • 相比之下存在（或有）的
    that exists or that has a particular quality only when compared with sth else

    同义词： comparative

    They now live in relative comfort (= compared with how they lived before) .

    他们现在过得比较舒适。

  • 关于（或涉及到）…的
    having a connection with sth; referring to sth

    the facts relative to the case

    与这个案件有关的事实

  • 亲戚；亲属 relation also have this meaning

relavent

  • 紧密相关的；切题的

    These comments are not directly relevant to this enquiry.

    这些意见与这项调查没有直接联系。

  • 有价值的；有意义的 having ideas that are valuable and useful to people in their lives and work

    Her novel is still relevant today.

    她的小说今天仍有现实意义。

16，Built with safety in mind 考虑到安全

17，On occasions it is the fear that certain disclosures may be unacceptable to family or friends that motivates an individual to seek professional help.
有时候，正是因为担心自己吐露的某些消息可能无法
被家人或朋友接受，才促使一个人寻求专业帮助。

18，Sometimes a new technology doesn’t drive the old one out, but only parts of it while forcing the rest to evolve.有时候，一项新技术不会消除旧技术，而只是使其部分消亡，同时迫使其余部分演变发展。

19，shift轮班
entry.summary:
1，hold the principle of mutual benefit.坚持互利原则

2，I was overwhelmed with longing for those innocent days of early childhood.我内心充满着对纯

entry.title: April 19th English Notes
entry.content:
Sentences

1,The popularity of the cellphones,along with the mobility and intimacy,will futher accelerate these trends of the lifestyle changes.
手机的普及以及移动性和亲密性将进一步加速这些生活方式改变的趋势。

2，In recent decades，the foreign cultures，along with the infiltration of western culture is being exported directly to our country,and it is increasingly apparent that this transfer will lead to a disaster,unless we donnot take ethnic traditional culture seriously.
近几十年来，随着西方文化的渗透，外国文化被直接出口到我国，除非我们不认真对待民族传统文化，否则这种转移将导致灾难，这一点越来越明显。

3,Gone are to the… ···不复存在

4,every day that we insist to study puts a step closer to fluecy,eloquence and a good command of language我们学习的每一天都离流畅、雄辩和良好的语言能力更近了一步

5,文章善用被动语态
if light is needed for life to form

6,Given new techniques,…,meaning…
entry.summary:
Sentences

1,The popularity of the cellphones,along with the mobility and intimacy,will futher accelerate these tre

entry.title: April 14th English Notes
entry.content:
words

1. greet - 对…作出反应 to react to sb/sth in a particular way - 映入…的眼帘to be the first thing that you see, hear or smell >Our help was greeted with appreciation. 受到了感谢
  1. prompt
    • 立即；迅速的；准时的 done without delay
    • 促使；导致 to be the first thing that you see, hear or smell
    • 提示，提醒，提词 to encourage sb to speak by asking them questions or suggesting words that they could say

      Prompt action was required as the fire spread.立即采取行动
      His speech prompted an angry outburst from a man激起了一男子的愤怒
      The program will prompt you to enter data where required.提醒你输入数据。

  2. popularization 普及
  3. engage
    • 吸引住（注意力、兴趣） to succeed in attracting and keeping sb’s attention and interest
    • 雇用；聘用 employ sb to do a particular job
    • engage in sth 从事，参加 engage in the activities

      It is a picturesque scenery place that engages us. 这是一个风景如画的地方，吸引了我们。
      He is currently engaged as a consultant.他现在受雇为顾问。

  4. justify 证实 ask for evidence to justify your bleak view
  5. sector 领域行业
  6. claim 宣称，索要， & proclaim 宣布，表明
    • to say that sth is true although it has not been proved and other people may not believe it
    • to publicly and officially tell people about sth important
  7. identical 相同的
  8. ideological 意识形态的
  9. whatsoever (用于名词词组后，加强否定陈述)丝毫，任何，无论什么

    There’s no reason whatsoever to turn down this suggestion.
    没有任何理由拒绝这个建议。

  10. back 支持 back up

phrases

1. could do with 需要

Teens could do with the edification and moralization of the traditional culture from the ancient poetry 青少年需要从古诗词中得到对传统文化的熏陶和教化。

  1. problems have been multiplying 成倍增加
entry.summary:
words

1. greet - 对…作出反应 to react to sb/sth in a particular way - 映入…的眼帘to be the first thing that you see, hear or smell >O

entry.title: April 11th English Notes
entry.content:
vocabulary

1,hypotheses n假说，假设;(凭空的)猜想

an idea which is suggested as a possible explanation for a particular situation or condition, but which has not yet been proved to be correct.
2,ideal n理想，完美的人或事
3,tempering n回火（炼钢）
tempering of the reality 现实的磨炼
4，argue 论证；说理
to give reasons why you think that sth is right/wrong, true/not true, etc., especially to persuade people that you are right
5,context 背景，上下文，语境
6，intervention 干涉;干预
7，recession 经济衰退;退后;撤回

the impact of the current recession on manufacturing
时下经济萎缩对制造业的影响

8,undertake 承担;从事;承诺
to make yourself responsible for sth and start doing it
to agree or promise that you will do sth

to undertake a task/project
He undertook to finish the job by Friday.
他答应星期五或之前完成这一工作。

9,slightly a little

I knew her slightly.

slender 苗条的;细的;窄的;微薄的;不足的

her slender figure 她苗条的身材

10,flourish v繁荣,昌盛,茁壮成长;健康幸福;(为引起注意)挥舞to develop quickly and be successful or common
n.令人难忘的方式;华丽辞藻an impressive act or way of doing sth

if our economy is to flourish 如果我们的经济要繁荣

11,succeed 接替；继任；随后出现

Who succeeded Kennedy as President?接替肯尼迪任总统的是谁？

12,elimate 消除

if the poverty is to be elimated 如果要消除贫困

13，well-being 健康幸福快乐

Singing can create a sense of wellbeing…唱歌能够给人一种心旷神怡的感觉。

14,Millennium [mɪˈleniəm] 一千年;千周年纪念日;千禧年
15,declaration 公告宣告 ~of a war; the Declaration of Independence
16,agency a government department that provides a particular service
17,gathering n.聚集;聚会;集会;收集v.聚集;集合;召集;收拢(分散的东西);搜集

the twenty-second annual gathering of the South Pacific Forum.第22届南太平洋论坛年会

18,indicator 指示信号;迹象;指示器;指针;方向灯
a sign that shows you what sth is like or how a situation is changing

The economic indicators are better than expected.经济指标比预期的好。

19,tease v.取笑;戏弄;挑逗，撩拨(异性)n.爱戏弄人的人;逗弄者;取笑者;戏弄;捉弄;勾引人者

tease out 套出，巧妙获得（信息或答案）
he was sure he could tease it out if only he had time. 他肯定，只要他有时间就一定能弄个清楚。
tease out the answers 套出答案

20,degradation 堕落;潦倒(的境况);a situation in which sb has lost all self-respect and the respect of other people 毁坏，恶化(过程)the process of something becoming worse or weaker, or being made worse or weaker.

the degradation of being sent to prison 被关进监狱的落泊境况
environmental degradation 环境恶化

21,derive v.获得;(使)起源;(使)产生
derive pleasure from helping others 助人为乐
be derived from sth 起源于；来自

‘politics’ is derived from a Greek word ‘politics’一词源自希腊语

22,propotion 部分;比例;倍数关系;均衡

a large proportion of 一大部分
The proportion of men to women 男女比例

23, grind 磨碎;磨快;磨光n.令人疲劳(或厌倦)的工作;苦差事;刺耳的摩擦声

to grind coffee/corn将咖啡 / 谷粒磨成粉

24,case n具体情况;事例;事实;特殊情况;案件；容器;论据
a particular situation or a situation of a particular type

In some cases 在某些情况下
the true situation
If that is the case (= if the situation described is true) 如果真是那样
a situation that relates to a particular person or thing
In your case, we are prepared to be lenient.根据你的情况，我们可以从宽处理。
a murder case 案件
the case for the defence/prosecution 有利于被告 / 原告的论据

25,graphic 图案的;形象的，生动的，逼真的(尤指令人不快的事物) 图表
very clear and full of details, especially about sth unpleasant

a graphic account/description of a battle 对战斗的生动叙述 / 描述
He kept telling us about his operation, in the most graphic detail .
他不停地向我们绘声绘色地讲述他动手术的详细情况。

26,discernible 看得清的;辨别得出的you can see it or recognize that it exists

Far away the outline of the island is just discernible…远处，岛屿轮廓仅依稀可辨。

27,across
across our diverse planet 在我们这个多元化的星球上
across a dozens of environment issue 在许多环境问题上
28,improvement 改善，改进

phrases

>1,Residence among the poor **is suggested as** a way of understanding their problems. >有人提出与穷人同住是了解他们问题的一种办法。

2,sow the seeds

I sow the seed in pots of soil-based compost. 我把种子种在几盆掺有堆肥的土里。

3,grind to a halt 逐渐停止;慢慢瘫痪;（车辆）声音刺耳地缓缓停下

In winter they almost grind to a halt. 到了冬天，它们会停止活动。

He cites capacitors and connectors, without which much of the modern world would grind to a halt. 他举了电容器和连接器的例子，没有这两样产品，现代世界将大面积陷入停顿。

4,better off 境况（尤指经济性）较好的

He’s much better off than before. 他手头比过去宽多了。
entry.summary:
vocabulary

1,hypotheses n假说，假设;(凭空的)猜想

an idea which is suggested as a possible explanation for a particular situation

entry.title: April 8th English Notes
entry.content:
1, concerns
2, a memorial service
3, tap water 自来水
4, fuel the “walking on eggshells”feeling 加剧了“如履薄冰”的感觉
5, aside 在旁边 She pulled the curtain aside.

sweep aside sweep human rights aside 对人权置之不顾

6, articles of the contract 合同条款
contract a project 承包工程
contract for 承办

7, arrange for 安排
8, training are increasingly important as the body ages
9, general practice 全科诊所
10, improve fuel efficiency and perfect(使完美) hybrid(混合动力) vehicles
11, commodity 商品;有用的东西
12, work out a solution 制定
13, offer onself to the state 为国献身
14, add fuel to 加油 v fuel
15, the Stock Exchange 证券交易所
16, exchange greetings 寒暄
17, a side dish 配菜
18, meet the criteria 符合标准
19, ongoing 进行中的
an ongoing debate The police investigation is ongoing.
20, conlusive evidence 确凿证据
21, scrutinize 仔细查看;认真检查;
The statement was carefully scrutinized before publication.声明在发表前经过仔细审查。
22, observational 观察的，观测的
23, randomize 使随机化；（使）作任意排列
24, dietary 饮食的;有关饮食的;
the dietary habits 饮食习惯
25, apparently 据…所知;看来;显然

according to what you have heard or read; according to the way sth appears
You use apparently to indicate that the information you are giving is something that you have heard, but you are not certain that it is true.

Apparently they are getting divorced soon.看样子，他们很快就要离婚。
Apparently the girls are not at all amused by the whole business…据说女孩们觉得整件事情一点也不好笑。
entry.summary:
1, concerns
2, a memorial service
3, tap water 自来水
4, fuel the “walking on eggshells”feeling 加剧了“如履薄冰”的感觉
5, aside 在旁边

entry.title: 数据库原理中函数依赖，函数依赖集，属性集闭包
entry.content:
理论准备：
Armstrong公理
F1(自反性)：若x包含y，xy都被F包含，则F逻辑蕴涵X→Y;
F2(增广性): 若X→Y为F所蕴涵，则XZ→YZ为F所蕴涵；
F3(传递性): 若X→Y,Y→Z为F所蕴涵，则X→Z为F所蕴涵；
F4(伪增性)：若X→Y，W≥Z(表W包含Z）为F所蕴涵，则XW→YZ为F所蕴涵；
—————（XZ→YZ,Z换成更大的W）
F5(伪传性): 若X→Y，YW→Z为F所蕴涵, 则XW→Z为F所蕴涵；（增广加传递）
F6(合成性): 若X→Y,X→Z为F所蕴涵，则X→YZ为F所蕴涵；
F7(分解性): 若X→Y,Z≤Y (表Z包含于Y）为F所蕴涵，则X→Z为F所蕴涵。

F:函数依赖集
U:属性集U={A1,A2,…,An}
R(U):属性集上面的一个关系模式

蕴涵&逻辑蕴涵：

蕴涵：A蕴含B,记为”A→B”
逻辑蕴涵：1，例：关系模式 R=(A,B,C),函数依赖集F={A→B,B→C}, F逻辑蕴涵A→C

闭包&属性（集）闭包

1，闭包：若F为关系模式R(U)的函数依赖集，我们把F以及所有被F逻辑蕴涵的函数依赖的集合称为F的闭包，记为F+
即：F+={X→Y|X→Y∈F∨“应用Armstong公理从F中导出的任何X→Y”}

2，F+，里面的元素是函数依赖（就是X→Y这种东西）
XF+，里面的元素是属性，这些属性是F根据Armstrong 公理推导出来的
(定义: 设关系模式R(U，F )，U 为其属性集，F 为其函数依赖集，则称在所有用Armstrong 公理从F 推出的函数依赖X → Ai 中，Ai 的属性集合为X 的属性闭包。)

一个重要的定理：X→Y属于F+，等价于Y属于XF+。X,Y都是U中的属性。（引理4）

覆盖

F+=G+ 等价于F包含于G+且G包含于F+，称F和G是等价的，也称F覆盖G或者G覆盖F。
证明：

为验证F、G是否等价，需要对任一X→Y属于F+检验是否X→Y属于G+, 由引理4可将这种检验转为是否
Y是否属于X关于F的闭包由此可将求F+这种不容易完成的事转为容易完成的事，即求属性闭包。

属性闭包的计算算法
求属性闭包的目的是为了判断一个函数依赖是否被一个F所蕴涵

最小覆盖

就是F中去掉某个函数依赖后如果还是和原来的等价，就可以把这个函数依赖删除，执行完后，剩下的函数依赖集合是最小覆盖
entry.summary:
理论准备：
Armstrong公理
F1(自反性)：若x包含y，xy都被F包含，则F逻辑蕴涵X→Y;
F2(增广性): 若X→Y为F所蕴涵，则XZ→YZ为F所蕴涵；
